channel.title: About on ZwodahS
channel.description: Recent content in About on ZwodahS

item.title: My Tooling and Workflow
item.description: History I only started working on the commandline around 2012, mainly because I need to edit python scripts on the server. At this stage, I didn’t really dive into vim plugins and stuff, I just used the default one. It was only until when I started making game in C++ that I started really upgrade my tooling and build my vimfiles and dotfiles. Around 2014, I started working more on the remote server and I added tmux to my tooling.
